div1.entryFree: Tumult, commotion, agitation, uproar: peeping forth this t. to behold, Lucr. 447. hostility and civil t. reigns between my conscience and my cousin's death, John IV, 2, 247. here's a goodly t. H4B II, 4, 219. what t. 's in the heavens? H6A I, 4, 98. what t. 's this, III, 1, 74. what hath broached this t. but thy pride? H6C II, 2, 159.
